calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs Pursuant To Ccp S.664.6
Off Calendar Feb-08-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

PLAINTIFF FUKUDA LAW FIRM, LAW OFFICES OF KENNETH FUKUDA'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs Pursuant To Ccp S.664.6.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs Pursuant To Ccp S. 664.6
Off Calendar Feb-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kenneth Fukuda, Esq. 415-571-8880 of Fukuda Law Firm for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF FUKUDA LAW FIRM, LAW OFFICES OF KENNETH FUKUDA'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs Pursuant To Ccp S. 664.6.

GRANT. No opposition filed. The court will execute the proposed order.

Stipulated Order is signed.(as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
